Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveใฎ็ตใฟๅใใใฎ53็ช็ฎใงใๅใฏ[[ไนๅฏ]]ใๆฌกใฏ[[ไธๅทณ]]ใงใใใ[[้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|้ฐ้ฝไบ่ก]]ใงใฏใ[[ๅๅนฒ]]ใฎ[[ไธ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[็ซ]]ใ[[ๅไบๆฏ]]ใฎ[[่พฐ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[ๅ]]ใงใ[[ไบ่กๆๆณ#็ธ็๏ผใใใใใ๏ผ|็ธ็]]๏ผ็ซ็ๅ๏ผใงใใใ

==ไธ่พฐใฎๆ== ่ฅฟๆฆๅนดใฎไธ1ๆกใ3ใป8๏ผๅๅนฒใ[[็ธ]]ใป[[ๆ]]๏ผใฎๅนดใฎ[[3ๆ]]ใไธ่พฐใฎ[[ๆ (ๆฆ)|ๆ]]ใจใชใใใใ ใใใใงใใๆใฏใ[[ๆงๆฆ]]ใฎๆใ[[็ฏๆ]]๏ผ[[ๆธ ๆ]]ใใ[[็ซๅค]]ใฎๅๆฅใพใง๏ผใ้ฉ็จใใๅ ดๅใใใใ

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveใฎ็ตใฟๅใใใฎ53็ช็ฎใงใๅใฏ[[ไนๅฏ]]ใๆฌกใฏ[[ไธๅทณ]]ใงใใใ[[้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|้ฐ้ฝไบ่ก]]ใงใฏใ[[ๅๅนฒ]]ใฎ[[ไธ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[็ซ]]ใ[[ๅไบๆฏ]]ใฎ[[่พฐ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[ๅ]]ใงใ[[ไบ่กๆๆณ#็ธ็๏ผใใใใใ๏ผ|็ธ็]]๏ผ็ซ็ๅ๏ผใงใใใ
==ไธ่พฐใฎๅนด== [[่ฅฟๆฆ]]ๅนดใ60ใงๅฒใฃใฆ56ใไฝใๅนดใไธ่พฐใฎ[[ๅนด]]ใจใชใใ {| class="wikitable" |+'''ไธ่พฐใฎๅนด''' |- ![[1ๅๅนด็ด]]!![[2ๅๅนด็ด]]!![[3ๅๅนด็ด]] |- | *[[56ๅนด]] *[[116ๅนด]] *[[176ๅนด]] *[[236ๅนด]] *[[296ๅนด]] *[[356ๅนด]] *[[416ๅนด]] *[[476ๅนด]] *[[536ๅนด]] *[[596ๅนด]] *[[656ๅนด]] *[[716ๅนด]] *[[776ๅนด]] *[[836ๅนด]] *[[896ๅนด]] *[[956ๅนด]] | *[[1016ๅนด]] *[[1076ๅนด]] *[[1136ๅนด]] *[[1196ๅนด]] *[[1256ๅนด]] *[[1316ๅนด]] *[[1376ๅนด]] *[[1436ๅนด]] *[[1496ๅนด]] *[[1556ๅนด]] *[[1616ๅนด]] *[[1676ๅนด]] *[[1736ๅนด]] *[[1796ๅนด]] *[[1856ๅนด]] *[[1916ๅนด]] *[[1976ๅนด]] | *[[2036ๅนด]] *[[2096ๅนด]] *[[2156ๅนด]] *[[2216ๅนด]] *[[2276ๅนด]] *[[2336ๅนด]] *[[2396ๅนด]] *[[2456ๅนด]] *[[2516ๅนด]] *[[2576ๅนด]] *[[2636ๅนด]] *[[2696ๅนด]] *[[2756ๅนด]] *[[2816ๅนด]] *[[2876ๅนด]] *[[2936ๅนด]] *[[2996ๅนด]] |}
==ไธ่พฐใฎๆ== ่ฅฟๆฆๅนดใฎไธ1ๆกใ3ใป8๏ผๅๅนฒใ[[็ธ]]ใป[[ๆ]]๏ผใฎๅนดใฎ[[3ๆ]]ใไธ่พฐใฎ[[ๆ (ๆฆ)|ๆ]]ใจใชใใใใ ใใใใงใใๆใฏใ[[ๆงๆฆ]]ใฎๆใ[[็ฏๆ]]๏ผ[[ๆธ ๆ]]ใใ[[็ซๅค]]ใฎๅๆฅใพใง๏ผใ้ฉ็จใใๅ ดๅใใใใ

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveใฎ็ตใฟๅใใใฎ53็ช็ฎใงใๅใฏ[[ไนๅฏ]]ใๆฌกใฏ[[ไธๅทณ]]ใงใใใ[[้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|้ฐ้ฝไบ่ก]]ใงใฏใ[[ๅๅนฒ]]ใฎ[[ไธ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[็ซ]]ใ[[ๅไบๆฏ]]ใฎ[[่พฐ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[ๅ]]ใงใ[[ไบ่กๆๆณ#็ธ็๏ผใใใใใ๏ผ|็ธ็]]๏ผ็ซ็ๅ๏ผใงใใใ

Sexagenary cycleใฎ็ตใฟๅใใใฎ53็ช็ฎใงใๅใฏ[[ไนๅฏ]]ใๆฌกใฏ[[ไธๅทณ]]ใงใใใ[[้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|้ฐ้ฝไบ่ก]]ใงใฏใ[[ๅๅนฒ]]ใฎ[[ไธ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[็ซ]]ใ[[ๅไบๆฏ]]ใฎ[[่พฐ]]ใฏ้ฝใฎ[[ๅ]]ใงใ[[ไบ่กๆๆณ#็ธ็๏ผใใใใใ๏ผ|็ธ็]]๏ผ็ซ็ๅ๏ผใงใใใ
==Yang Fire Dragon (ไธ่พฐ)'s Years== [[่ฅฟๆฆ]]ๅนดใ60ใงๅฒใฃใฆ56ใไฝใๅนดใไธ่พฐใฎ[[ๅนด]]ใจใชใใ {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Fire Dragon (ไธ่พฐ)'s years table''' |- ![[1ๅๅนด็ด]]!![[2ๅๅนด็ด]]!![[3ๅๅนด็ด]] |- | *[[56ๅนด]] *[[116ๅนด]] *[[176ๅนด]] *[[236ๅนด]] *[[296ๅนด]] *[[356ๅนด]] *[[416ๅนด]] *[[476ๅนด]] *[[536ๅนด]] *[[596ๅนด]] *[[656ๅนด]] *[[716ๅนด]] *[[776ๅนด]] *[[836ๅนด]] *[[896ๅนด]] *[[956ๅนด]] | *[[1016ๅนด]] *[[1076ๅนด]] *[[1136ๅนด]] *[[1196ๅนด]] *[[1256ๅนด]] *[[1316ๅนด]] *[[1376ๅนด]] *[[1436ๅนด]] *[[1496ๅนด]] *[[1556ๅนด]] *[[1616ๅนด]] *[[1676ๅนด]] *[[1736ๅนด]] *[[1796ๅนด]] *[[1856ๅนด]] *[[1916ๅนด]] *[[1976ๅนด]] | *[[2036ๅนด]] *[[2096ๅนด]] *[[2156ๅนด]] *[[2216ๅนด]] *[[2276ๅนด]] *[[2336ๅนด]] *[[2396ๅนด]] *[[2456ๅนด]] *[[2516ๅนด]] *[[2576ๅนด]] *[[2636ๅนด]] *[[2696ๅนด]] *[[2756ๅนด]] *[[2816ๅนด]] *[[2876ๅนด]] *[[2936ๅนด]] *[[2996ๅนด]] |}
==Yang Fire Dragon (ไธ่พฐ)'s Months== ่ฅฟๆฆๅนดใฎไธ1ๆกใ3ใป8๏ผๅๅนฒใ[[็ธ]]ใป[[ๆ]]๏ผใฎๅนดใฎ[[3ๆ]]ใไธ่พฐใฎ[[ๆ (ๆฆ)|ๆ]]ใจใชใใใใ ใใใใงใใๆใฏใ[[ๆงๆฆ]]ใฎๆใ[[็ฏๆ]]๏ผ[[ๆธ ๆ]]ใใ[[็ซๅค]]ใฎๅๆฅใพใง๏ผใ้ฉ็จใใๅ ดๅใใใใ

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

(ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

[[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

[[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

[[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

[[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅ ญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅ ญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. --> ==Years of Yang Fire Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that, when divided by 60, leaves a remainder of 56 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Fire Dragon (ไธ่พฐ)'s years table''' |- ! year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅ ญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅ ญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Fire Dragon== ==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}=== The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅ ซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==

The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dragon|kanji=ไธ่พฐ|romaji=hinoe tatsu|onyomi=heishin|p=bวngchรฉn|w=ping-ch'en|mi=pสฐiลยฒยน สอกสสฐษn|y=bing2 san4|j=bing2 san4|ci=pษชล sษn|mc=pรฆล ษin|oc-bs=praล ษiล|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Yang Fire|ja|ไธ|1=Hinoe (ไธ)|lt=Hinoe (ไธ)|2=ja|3=ไธ|4=zh|5=ไธ|1=Hinoe (ไธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (ไธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (ไธ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (็ซ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (็ซ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|2=uk|3=ะะพะณะพะฝั (ะฃ-ััะฝ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hแปa (Ngลฉ hร nh)|10=ar|11=ุงููุงุฑ (ูู ุดููุบ)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|2=uk|3=ะะพะณะพะฝั (ะฃ-ััะฝ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hแปa (Ngลฉ hร nh)|10=ar|11=ุงููุงุฑ (ูู ุดููุบ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (็ซ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|2=uk|3=ะะพะณะพะฝั (ะฃ-ััะฝ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hแปa (Ngลฉ hร nh)|10=ar|11=ุงููุงุฑ (ูู ุดููุบ)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|lt=Fire ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==

The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dragon|kanji=ไธ่พฐ|romaji=hinoe tatsu|onyomi=heishin|p=bวngchรฉn|w=ping-ch'en|mi=pสฐiลยฒยน สอกสสฐษn|y=bing2 san4|j=bing2 san4|ci=pษชล sษn|mc=pรฆล ษin|oc-bs=praล ษiล|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Yang Fire|ja|ไธ|1=Hinoe (ไธ)|lt=Hinoe (ไธ)|2=ja|3=ไธ|4=zh|5=ไธ|1=Hinoe (ไธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (ไธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (ไธ)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (็ซ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (็ซ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|2=uk|3=ะะพะณะพะฝั (ะฃ-ััะฝ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hแปa (Ngลฉ hร nh)|10=ar|11=ุงููุงุฑ (ูู ุดููุบ)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|lt=Fire (็ซ)|2=uk|3=ะะพะณะพะฝั (ะฃ-ััะฝ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dragon|kanji=ไธ่พฐ|romaji=hinoe tatsu|onyomi=heishin|p=bวngchรฉn|w=ping-ch'en|mi=pสฐiลยฒยน สอกสสฐษn|y=bing2 san4|j=bing2 san4|ci=pษชล sษn|mc=pรฆล ษin|oc-bs=praล ษiล|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|ltq=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Dragon|kanji=ไธ่พฐ|romaji=hinoe tatsu|onyomi=heishin|p=bวngchรฉn|w=ping-ch'en|mi=pสฐiลยฒยน สอกสสฐษn|y=bing2 san4|j=bing2 san4|ci=pษชล sษn|mc=pรฆล ษin|oc-bs=praล ษiล|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.

'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.

'''Yang Fire Dragon also known as ไธ่พฐ''' (hinoetatsu, heikano-tatsu, heishin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 53rd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|ๅญๅๅนฒๆฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ๅนฒๆฏ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Yin Wood Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Wood Rabbit|2=ja|ไนๅฏ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Yang Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|ไธๅทณ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Fire Dragon==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|lt=Mizunoto (็ธ)|2=ja|3=็ธ|4=zh|5=็ธ|1=Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (็ธ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|March|en|March|WD=Q110|lt=March|1=March}} is designated as the month of {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term โmonthโ may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Qingming (solar term)|en|Qingming (solar term)|WD=Q1680269|lt=Qingming|1=Qingming (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Fire Dragon==
==={{nihongo|selection days|้ธๆฅ|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The selected day for {{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|ไธ่พฐ|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|ๅซๅฐ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
